creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
The plan to fix dependent ports (see bug 240546) in quarterly is as follows:

1) Land new port py-ephem (bug 240736) and MFH
2) Add py-ephem as a RUN_DEPENDS to existing astro/pyephem and MFH (I may do this as a single commit with (1))
3) Rename astro/pyephem -> astro/py-pyephem (and *not* MFH)
